summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vetrox PPF website updates. All major features working correctly including Gmail SMTP, image swaps, form updates, hero padding fix, and SEO optimization.

design_issues.issue: Meta description could be enhanced with more PPF keywords

passed_tests: Enquiry form submission with all field types
Hero section 'Premium Paint Protection Film' visibility below navbar
Product images correctly swapped (white car for Gloss, grey satin for Matte, red car for Coloured)
Contact form has all required fields (Name, Email, Phone, Company, Enquiry Type dropdown, Message)
Enquiry Type dropdown contains all 6 required options
No radio buttons present on contact form
Form submission integration with backend API
SEO meta tags present with PPF and Australia keywords
